003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson;
018
019/**
020 * BSON element type codes per the
021 * <a class="doclink" href="https://bsonspec.org/spec.html">BSON Specification 1.1</a>.
022 *
023 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
024 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Bson">BSON Basics</a>
025 * </ul>
026 */
027public enum DataType {
028
029   /** 64-bit IEEE 754 double. */
030   DOUBLE(0x01),
031   /** UTF-8 string. */
032   STRING(0x02),
033   /** Embedded document. */
034   DOCUMENT(0x03),
035   /** Array (document with numeric keys). */
036   ARRAY(0x04),
037   /** Binary data. */
038   BINARY(0x05),
039   /** Deprecated undefined. */
040   UNDEFINED(0x06),
041   /** MongoDB ObjectId (12 bytes). */
042   OBJECT_ID(0x07),
043   /** Boolean. */
044   BOOLEAN(0x08),
045   /** UTC datetime (int64 millis). */
046   DATETIME(0x09),
047   /** Null value. */
048   NULL(0x0A),
049   /** Regular expression. */
050   REGEX(0x0B),
051   /** Deprecated DBPointer. */
052   DB_POINTER(0x0C),
053   /** JavaScript code. */
054   JAVASCRIPT(0x0D),
055   /** Deprecated symbol. */
056   SYMBOL(0x0E),
057   /** JavaScript with scope. */
058   JS_WITH_SCOPE(0x0F),
059   /** 32-bit integer. */
060   INT32(0x10),
061   /** MongoDB timestamp. */
062   TIMESTAMP(0x11),
063   /** 64-bit integer. */
064   INT64(0x12),
065   /** IEEE 754-2008 decimal128. */
066   DECIMAL128(0x13),
067   /** MinKey (sort order). */
068   MIN_KEY(0xFF),
069   /** MaxKey (sort order). */
070   MAX_KEY(0x7F);
071
072   private static final DataType[] BY_VALUE;
073
074   static {
075      var max = 256;
076      BY_VALUE = new DataType[max];
077      for (var dt : values()) {
078         var v = dt.value & 0xFF;
079         if (v < max)
080            BY_VALUE[v] = dt;
081      }
082   }
083
084   final int value;
085
086   DataType(int value) {
087      this.value = value;
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Returns the DataType for the given byte value.
092    *
093    * @param b The byte value (0x01-0x13, 0x7F, 0xFF).
094    * @return The corresponding DataType, or <jk>null</jk> if unknown.
095    */
096   public static DataType fromByte(int b) {
097      var v = b & 0xFF;
098      return v < BY_VALUE.length ? BY_VALUE[v] : null;
099   }
100}
